title: Small Town Girl
director: William A. Wellman, Robert Z. Leonard
writer: John Lee Mahin, Frances Goodrich, Albert Hackett
actors: Janet Gaynor, Robert Taylor, Binnie Barnes
plot: Kay lives in a small rural time and thinks that her life is just too dull and repetitious to bear. One night she meets young, handsome, rich Bob Dakin, who asks her for directions while drunk, then proceeds to take her out for a n...
